title: Senior Software Engineer - Naukri - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Naukri - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the Naukri family as a Senior Software Engineer in Thane. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Naukri:
Naukri is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Naukri!
